message:
🐛 fix: address Copilot review on MaintenanceWindows delete-confirm (#7935) (#7936)

Four follow-ups to PR #7934:

1. Shared constant — replace local `DELETE_CONFIRM_TIMEOUT_MS = 3000`
   with the existing `DELETE_CONFIRM_TIMEOUT_MS` export from
   `lib/constants/network.ts` (already used by ResolutionHistoryPanel).
   Keeps delete-confirm timing consistent across the app.

2. i18n — route the new user-facing strings (`title`, `aria-label`, and
   the "Confirm?" label) through `t('cards:maintenanceWindows.…')`.
   Adds `deleteTitle`, `deleteAria`, `clickAgainToConfirm`,
   `confirmDeleteAria`, `confirmLabel` keys to `en/cards.json`.

3. Keyboard accessibility — the ✕ button was `opacity-0` outside hover,
   so its focus ring was effectively invisible to keyboard users. Add
   `group-focus-within:opacity-100`, `focus-visible:opacity-100`, and
   a `focus-visible:outline` so the control (and its focus state) is
   discoverable without a mouse.

4. Outside-click cancels confirm — the PR #7934 test plan promised that
   clicking away resets the confirm state, but the implementation only
   cleared on timeout or second-click. Add a `pointerdown` listener on
   the document while `pendingDeleteId` is set; any click outside the
   active confirm button cancels the pending state. Uses a ref on the
   confirm-mode button so the check is scoped.

Fixes #7935

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
